readiness_conditions: implement strict instrument classification/filtering and fail-closed mixed instrument handling
caveats: mixed instruments likely present; endpoint name says mainboard but observed row count includes non-common instruments; must classify/filter fail-closed

reasoning: both selected endpoints expose latest daily official rows with symbol/name/date/OHLC/change/volume/value/transactions
field names and extra TPEx fields differ, so parsers and mappings stay source-specific
non_blocking_differences: TWSE has smaller listed-market row set; TPEx endpoint includes many warrant/bond-like rows and extra quote/reference fields
selected endpoints have no documented date parameter; use latest official EOD only until historical endpoints are separately contracted

notes: latest available official OpenAPI array; no date parameter exposed by selected endpoint
latest available official OpenAPI array; no date parameter exposed by selected endpoint
invalid/extra query parameters were ignored by observed endpoint; selected endpoint has no documented query parameters
invalid/extra query parameters were ignored by observed endpoint; selected endpoint has no documented query parameters

known_caveats: selected endpoints are latest official daily arrays, not historical-by-date contracts
TPEx endpoint has mixed instrument coverage; classification/filtering required
